prompt: Create blog post from notes about WebSockets

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: concept_style_used
assertions.description: Uses concept explanation starting with HTTP problem then WebSocket solution

assertions.name: has_comparison_table
assertions.description: Compares HTTP vs WebSocket and Socket.io vs native WebSocket

assertions.name: has_complete_chat_example
assertions.description: Includes full working Socket.io chat implementation (server + client)

assertions.name: covers_all_use_cases
assertions.description: Mentions all use cases: chat, notifications, collaborative editing, gaming, stock tickers

assertions.name: explains_handshake
assertions.description: Explains the HTTP to WebSocket upgrade handshake process

assertions.name: has_connection_diagram
assertions.description: Includes visual representation of WebSocket connection lifecycle
